expectations.evidence: First step is 'hermai registry list --query etsy' and API equivalent. Registry check is the opening move.
Pull command includes --intent 'fetching product listings with prices titles and shop names from Etsy search results'. API call includes X-Hermai-Intent header.
Step 3 shows curl command calling the discovered endpoint URL with jq extraction.
No mention of BeautifulSoup, Selenium, Puppeteer, or HTML parsing. Uses hermai exclusively.
